# Slide: Proof Pyramid

```text
        Intent evidence
   Direct payment / instructions

       Case evidence
Regulators, platforms, courts, reporting

  Statistical coordination evidence
    Null models, graph clusters, bursts

     Causal experimental evidence
  Social proof, fake reviews, early success

       Formal mathematical proof
 Monotone allocation, feedback, thresholds
```

Use this to prevent overclaiming. Put each claim on the pyramid and label it honestly.
